name: Interactive Module Builder
description: Create production-grade AI-Hydro interactive learning modules — HTML files with executable Python cells, interactivity primitives (timeline, compare, sim, plot, 3D scene3d), Manim video cells, real AI-Hydro branding (animated logo, dark theme), peer-reviewed citations, full provenance, CC-BY-4.0 license. Auto-opens in AI-Hydro HTML Preview panel.
author: AI-Hydro Team
when_to_use: When the user wants to create a learning module, tutorial, interactive lesson, or educational content for hydrology
